caption:
Men's looks of the week!

Three looks, three different ways to meet the season with ease. From the washed-out ease of a sports set to bold stripes made for slow bar stools, all the way to loose trousers and florals that move like the breeze through an open window — this is how the summer starts. Swipe through and find the version of yourself that belongs here.

Sports set: @takeshykurosawa_official
Striped shirt & shorts: @bl.11_blockeleven
Floral shirt & trousers: @takeshykurosawa_official
